text: Chloe texted asking if we're still doing Sunday breakfast at Cerrone's. Told her probably but wanted to check with you first.
Yeah Marie already started planning, she texted me this morning lol. We're locked in.
Cool. I'll grab the good coffee beans on the way home, not dealing with whatever she keeps in that cabinet.
She's going to make you take it anyway and you're going to drink it to be polite 😂
Every single time. I'm a PA in an ED, I have diagnosed worse things than bad coffee. I'll survive.
Just get home safe. Nolan's here, we'll eat when you're ready. No rush.
Nolan you take your D3 today or did you forget again like last week
dad i'm 22 i don't need vitamin reminders
you said that in March too and then called me wheezing through February
ok fine yes i took it. how's the shift going
slammed. Phil and I had three chest pains before 9am. Stamford really said let's all have heart attacks on a Tuesday
lmaoo go save lives old man i'll text you tonight
dad did you take your vitamin D today or are you lying to yourself again
took it with coffee at 6:45, before you even woke up
ugh fine. how's the shift going
three lacs, one chest pain that turned into a real thing, and someone who googled their rash. so normal tuesday at harborview
phil cover anything for you at least
he took the rash guy. true friendship
